description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-pagination

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-pagination/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Button styles, active page, disabled. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. nav with aria-label="Pagination". Current page (aria-current). Keyboard navigation.
3. **Functionality** — Page count. Current page. Page change events. Truncation (ellipsis). First/last buttons. Per-page selector.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Responsive (compact on mobile).
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Page changes. Truncation. Keyboard. Edge cases (1 page).
8. **Storybook** — Few pages. Many pages. Truncated. Compact.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Views pager. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-pagination
